overnight_news: **Trump's 15% global tariff** to take effect later this week, per Bessent; impacts broad market, tech (NVDA, TSLA, MU, AMZN).[1]
**Escalating US-Iran war** driving oil to $79/barrel, Strait of Hormuz blockade fears; hits energy, broad indices (Dow -785 pts).[2]
**Trump offers risk insurance, Navy escorts** for Hormuz tankers, easing some geopolitical tensions; supports shipping, oil-related stocks.[1][2]
**Iranian operatives reach out** for potential US peace talks; could reduce Middle East risk premium on stocks.[1]
**Upcoming weekly jobless claims data** and earnings from Kroger (KR), Costco (COST), Marvell (MRVL); key for market open.[1]
